CalculateGeometryAttributes "Veracruz - Tampico" "Long_kms LENGTH_GEODESIC" KILOMETERS # PROJCRS["WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_14N",BASEGEOGCRS["GCS_WGS_1984",DYNAMIC[FRAMEEPOCH[1990.5],MODEL["AM0-2"]],DATUM["D_WGS_1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],CONVERSION["Transverse_Mercator",METHOD["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-99.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["Easting (X)",east,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2]],LENGTHUNIT["Meter",1.0],ID["EPSG","32614"]] SAME_AS_INPUT
CalculateField "Veracruz - Tampico" Digitaliza "Sin digitalizar" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateGeometryAttributes "Ver - Tamp Vuelo" "Long_kms LENGTH_GEODESIC" KILOMETERS # PROJCRS["WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_14N",BASEGEOGCRS["GCS_WGS_1984",DYNAMIC[FRAMEEPOCH[1990.5],MODEL["AM0-2"]],DATUM["D_WGS_1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],CONVERSION["Transverse_Mercator",METHOD["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-99.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["Easting (X)",east,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2]],LENGTHUNIT["Meter",1.0],ID["EPSG","32614"]] SAME_AS_INPUT

FeatureClassToFeatureClass "Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón" F:\drone\web\V_T\shp Vera___Tamp_Digitalizacón.shp # "ID "ID" true true false 5 Long 0 5,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,ID,-1,-1;NOMBRE "NOMBRE" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,NOMBRE,0,253;PEAJE "PEAJE" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,PEAJE,0,253;Km_Mosaico "Km_Mosaico" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Km_Mosaico,0,49;Tipo "Tipo" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Tipo,0,19;Elaboro "Elaboro" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Elaboro,0,19;Estatus "Estatus" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Estatus,0,19;Avance_shp "Avance_shp" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Avance_shp,0,19;Long_kms "Long_kms" true true false 7 Float 1 6,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Long_kms,-1,-1;km_acumula "km_acumula" true true false 7 Float 1 6,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,km_acumula,-1,-1;Digitaliza "Digitaliza" true true false 30 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Digitaliza,0,29;ID2 "ID2" true true false 9 Double 3 8,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,ID2,-1,-1;Nom_imagen "Nom_imagen" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Nom_imagen,0,99;Link "Link" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Vera - Tamp Digitalizacón,Link,0,253" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
